artifact_classes.examples: goals, success criteria, constraints, risk boundaries
plans, playbooks, route graphs, canary plans
skills, tools, context recipes, reusable procedures
permissions, vetoes, risk gates, rollback rules
rubrics, negative controls, holdouts, verifier criteria
execution bundles, tool plans, runtime decisions
context recipes, retrieval scopes, data boundaries
upgrade candidates, canary verdicts, propagated releases

claim_boundary: This expansion does not claim achieved superintelligence, Kardashev Type II civilization, guaranteed wealth, investment returns, audited customer ROI, financial advice, legal advice, medical advice, policy advice, token advice, or autonomous self-improvement without controls. It defines and publishes the architecture for governed proof-carrying agent evolution.

goals_used.direction: Every run must begin with explicit goals and success criteria.
goals_used.name: Direction Integrity

goals_used.direction: Plans must remain aligned with goals, constraints, and risk budgets.
goals_used.name: Strategy Fidelity
goals_used.why: Without strategy, capability becomes motion without direction.

goals_used.direction: Successful work should become reusable capability artifacts.
goals_used.name: Capability Reuse
goals_used.why: Reusable capability is the compounding asset.

goals_used.direction: Every execution must produce replayable evidence.
goals_used.name: Proof Completeness
Selection Discipline
goals_used.why: The network must select reality, not persuasive noise.

goals_used.direction: Every propagated upgrade must be reversible or containable.
goals_used.name: Rollback Sovereignty
goals_used.why: Evolution without rollback is not governable.

goals_used.direction: Every flagship proof must have a page, receipt, report, checksum, and root link.
goals_used.name: Public Evidence
goals_used.why: The public system must explain itself from evidence.

plans_used.name: Commit Standardization Plan
plans_used.strategy: Turn every job into a structured commitment before execution.

plans_used.name: Artifact Resolution Plan
plans_used.risk_budget: bounded by policy and approval rules
plans_used.strategy: Resolve only the active artifacts needed for the run.

plans_used.name: Proof Ledger Plan
plans_used.strategy: Capture every execution as append-only evidence.

plans_used.name: Selection Gate Plan
plans_used.strategy: Promote upgrades only after proof, canary, monitoring, rollback, and scope checks.

plans_used.name: Artifact Vault Expansion Plan
plans_used.strategy: Version and index reusable intelligence as immutable artifacts.

plans_used.name: Command Center Archive Plan
plans_used.strategy: Publish every proof with a permanent page, evidence JSON, report, badge, and root link.

plans_used.name: Negative-Control Discipline Plan
plans_used.strategy: Inject attractive false upgrades to test whether proof selection rejects them.

proof_archive_standard: link back to Public SkillOS Command Center

protocol.definition: Defines direction, success criteria, constraints, risk, policy, budget, and evaluation requirements.
Resolves strategies, skills, tools, policies, context, and approvals, then executes agents at scale.
Records trace, score, feedback, cost, latency, tool history, policy decisions, failures, and credit assignment.
Promotes only upgrades that passed evaluation, approval, canary, monitoring, rollback, and scope control.

public_language.best_line: One agent proves. The network improves.
public_language.do_not_say: Every job magically makes the agent smarter.
public_language.do_say: Every job leaves proof. Every proof compounds intelligence.
public_language.root_contract: The root is the Public SkillOS Command Center. Protocols and proofs are rooms. A room must never replace the lobby.
public_language.title: SkillOS Agent Evolution Protocol

skills_used.input_signal: job request, constraints, budget, risk, evals
skills_used.name: Commit Compiler
skills_used.purpose: Turns a job request into a structured commitment.

skills_used.name: Plan Graph Resolver
skills_used.purpose: Selects the plans and playbooks required for a run.

skills_used.name: Skill Resolver
skills_used.purpose: Finds and scopes reusable skills for execution.

skills_used.input_signal: accepted goals, plans, skills, policies, evals
skills_used.name: Artifact Vault Curator
skills_used.purpose: Versions, signs, scopes, and indexes reusable intelligence artifacts.

skills_used.name: Run Fabric Executor
skills_used.purpose: Executes agents at scale from resolved artifacts while keeping runtime stateless.

skills_used.input_signal: trace, score, tool history, policy decisions, costs
skills_used.name: Proof Trace Capture
Credit Assignment
skills_used.purpose: Determines which artifacts contributed to success or failure.

skills_used.name: Upgrade Proposal Generator
skills_used.purpose: Converts proof and attribution into candidate upgrades.

skills_used.input_signal: upgrade proposal, evals, risk, canary result
skills_used.name: Selection Gate Judge
skills_used.purpose: Promotes only what passed proof, risk, rollback, and scope checks.

skills_used.name: Canary Release Manager
skills_used.purpose: Tests upgrades in limited scope before broad propagation.

skills_used.input_signal: upgrade diff, affected agents, risk register
skills_used.name: Rollback Planner
skills_used.purpose: Ensures every propagated upgrade can be reversed or contained.

skills_used.name: Negative-Control Generator
skills_used.purpose: Creates attractive but false upgrades to test selection discipline.

skills_used.name: Archive Publisher
skills_used.purpose: Publishes proof page, evidence JSON, report, badge, checksum, and root link.

skills_used.name: Command Center Integrator
skills_used.purpose: Keeps the root Command Center complete, current, and viewer-friendly.

skills_used.name: Live Root Verifier
skills_used.purpose: Checks that /skillos/ and /skillos/index.html remain the Command Center.

skills_used.input_signal: source protocol JSON and proof archive
skills_used.name: Evolution Receipt Renderer
skills_used.purpose: Explains agent evolution to non-technical viewers through goals, plans, skills, and proofs.

systems.description: Turns mission into explicit goals, success criteria, constraints, and risk boundaries.
systems.name: GoalOS

systems.description: Converts goals into plans, playbooks, route graphs, and canary strategies.
systems.name: PlanOS

systems.description: Stores and routes verified reusable skills, tools, context recipes, and procedures.
systems.name: SkillOS

systems.description: Selects what evolves based on proof, not vibes, claims, or proxy gaming.
systems.name: Proof Gradient

systems.description: Stores versioned, scoped, signed, auditable, rollbackable artifacts.
systems.name: Artifact Vault

systems.description: Runs stateless agents by resolving artifacts, executing work, and emitting proof.
systems.name: Run Fabric

systems.description: Records append-only evidence from every execution.
systems.name: Proof Ledger

systems.description: Promotes only improvements that proved themselves and can be monitored and rolled back.
systems.name: Selection Gate
